calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-12-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ezekiel D. Carder, of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, Tel. 510.337.1001, for petitioners;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, AND NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge Harold Kahn; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/HK)
